title: elaphoglossum chocoense
intro: Elaphoglossum chocoense, also known as the Choco elaphoglossum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of the Pacific coast of Central and South America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum chocoense include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Elaphoglossum chocoense can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical paste for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
